title: VN Translate Mods
body:
Maybe it's a bit short. This is a resource pack that adds a language VI_VN to the mods that do not support the language VI_VN that I often use to deploy mods. It sounds a bit confusing, so you have to try it to know

<details>
<summary>Support mod</summary>
